it has been

since a girl walked onto this earth
with a smile that could light up any room.

A small gift from Mr. Perfect

Dear Vishu!

Seven years. One badly-aimed paper airplane.
Still the best mistake I ever made.

scroll

how this started

A flight that went badly off course

✈

the seating chart

I sat in the back row. You sat up front. As far as you were concerned, I didn't exist.

✈

the mistake

I was folding paper airplanes instead of paying attention, like any responsible back-row student. One throw went badly. It hit you.

✈

the turn

You spun around, fully ready for war. I started calling you my Angry Bird that very same day — you just didn't know it yet.

✈

the moment

You were mid-sentence, telling me off. I'd already stopped listening. I was just looking at you, wondering how anyone could be this angry and this beautiful at the same time. That's the exact second I fell.

✈

the wait

I carried that for the rest of school. Too nervous to say a word, for years.

✈

the last day

Last day of school. Nothing left to lose. I told you.

✈

the yes

You said yes. Seven years later, you still do.

a few thousand photos, narrowed down

Some I keep going back to

the part I'm bad at saying out loud

So I wrote it down instead

♥

Written just for you ♡

✿ ✿

last thing

One more flight to make

tap the plane to open your gift

Before anything else — Vishu. Seven years of arguments you started and apologies I somehow still owe you for. I wouldn't trade a single one of them. This is for you.

Scan me ❤

My dear Angry Bird! Happy birthday. Aaj meri pyari Vishu ka birthday hai, to tu bas QR scan kar aur bol tujhe kya chahiye — aur woh sab tere ghar aa jayega. And I love you soo much.

made with a few late nights, for the girl who turned around angry
